articles.author: Trey Wallace
articles.title: Final Four Sticker Shock: That’ll Be $1,200 (Or $600 For A Dot On The Court), And An Illinois Invasion - OutKick
articles.description: Prices for the Final Four in Indianapolis have officially entered “sell a kidney" territory, and Illinois fans ready to turn Lucas Oil Stadium into Champaign East.
articles.content:
INDIANAPOLIS — If you’re thinking about attending the Final Four this weekend, you might want to lock in tickets now, because who knows what ticket prices will be closer to tip-off.
